win.name: Fact
keyFactors: Field-leading fig 103 earns full +10 Fig Gap points
Won last start convincingly, class drop from stakes to allowance +2
negatives: Zero distance experience at 1 1/8 miles -1

win.analysis: Fact posted a field-best 103 last out, gets class relief dropping from stakes company, and Prat/Walden is a top combo.

place.name: Chillax
keyFactors: Recent fig of 94 within 9 of leader, solid consistency +3
negatives: Declining trend over last 5 starts -1
Figure gap to Fact is meaningful at 9 points
place.analysis: Chillax is proven at this distance with multiple route trips and a consistent top-end figure.

show.name: McAfee
keyFactors: Second-best recent fig at 100, within 3 of leader gets +9
Route experience with G1/G2 stakes background +3
negatives: Last start was a poor 67, fast-declining trend -3 and dec-fast -3 penalty dragging score
Has not raced since May, 45+ days off
show.analysis: McAfee's career ceiling is elite but the last race fig (67) raises a red flag on current form.

win.name: Rockabye
keyFactors: Flightline $125K stud fee is field-best sire, strong pedigree for turf sprint +2
Clement 1stTimer 24% wins, Franco 18% with trainer = both 20%+ T/J +3
Best workout pattern for turf sprint maiden: 4F :48.95 at Saratoga training track (21/62) +3 workout booster
negatives: No starts, zero surface experience -4 offset by first-timer booster
Trainer 1stTimer 24% is strong but no published PP to verify
win.analysis: Rockabye gets the nod on superior pedigree (Flightline x Into Mischief), top-barn Clement/Franco, and the best workout pattern among first-timers in this field.

place.name: Timbertop
keyFactors: Only horse with a published start and fig (61) — actual running lines are primary signal +3 for having the fig

negatives: Last race fig of 61 is modest; ran third beaten 2+ lengths
Surface Exp only 1 start (dirt sprint), switching to turf = zero turf exp -4

show.name: Charlotte's Beach

negatives: Zero starts, no surface exp -4

show.analysis: Charlotte's Beach has the pedigree, connections, and a bullet work to justify third-choice status among the first-timers.

otherContenders.name: Space for Grace
